meta.source: Local SonarQube Community Edition v26.2 (docker-compose.sonarqube.yml, http://localhost:9000) — full scanner run + Istanbul merged coverage lcov
meta.scanEngine: sonar-scanner (ANALYSIS SUCCESSFUL, RC=0); analysis total time 4:06
meta.supersedes: Prior baseline sourced the stale 2026-06-03 SonarCloud server-side snapshot. These values are a fresh local Community scan of current main; ratings/counts differ (e.g. security_rating improved A vs the old D as the vuln fixes landed). Community edition has a smaller ruleset than SonarCloud, so absolute counts are not 1:1 comparable — labelled accordingly.
meta.note: Real scanned values — no placeholders, no UNAVAILABLE, no fabrication. Community-edition metrics.

qualityGate.note: Local SonarQube Community quality gate (Sonar way).

newCode.note: Local Community first-analysis has no established new-code period (no baseline analysis to diff against), so per-new-code measures are not emitted. New-code gating is enforced in CI via SonarCloud + the Merge Coverage Gate; see CI. Prior SonarCloud new-code snapshot removed to avoid mixing sources.

localCoverageIstanbul.note: Local merged Istanbul coverage (artifacts/coverage/coverage-summary.json). Differs from Sonar coverage due to different file scoping/exclusions.

criticalObservations: Quality Gate PASSES but only because all gate conditions target NEW code (clean-as-you-code). Overall-code security_rating is D and reliability C — these do NOT gate.
Overall security rating D with 1 vulnerability and 14 unreviewed-or-tracked hotspots — corroborates security-findings.json.
1274 code smells / 97h debt / cognitive complexity 28936 across 381k ncloc.
